## Verification
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:terraform-identifiers`
- [ ] `npm run compile`

## Review checklist
- [ ] No subscription IDs, tenant IDs, credentials, plan files, state, or sensitive logs are committed.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and Preview limitations are documented.
- [ ] Tests cover compliant, non-compliant, unresolved, error, and migration paths as applicable.
- [ ] Generated Terraform and file writes require explicit user action.
- [ ] Backward compatibility and evidence-schema impact were considered.
